title: S3: e2e vòng trọn executor giả + chain-handoff contract doc
action: e2e: repo git tạm (mkdtemp + git init + commit gốc) với .fgos khởi tạo + .fgos-runner.json trỏ executor giả (script node: tạo file theo yêu cầu prompt + git commit trong cwd); add 2 item có dep; chạy bin/fgos-runner.mjs --once qua child process thật → assert: item 1 proposed, nhánh fgw/ có commit worker, verify của item được runner chạy (bằng chứng trong output), events.jsonl đúng chuỗi (doing rồi proposed, mang v), item 2 CHƯA mở (dep proposed); chạy --once lần hai → item 2 vẫn không được dispatch (frontier rỗng). Case lỗi: executor giả cố tình không commit/verify đỏ → item về blocked sau retry theo bảng. docs/routing-handoff-contract.md: contract chuyển việc agent↔agent thành văn (per L4 prose-handoff): khung prompt 4 phần (mục tiêu/ranh giới/proof/cấm fgos), bảng entry-router cho skill forgent tương lai, câu handoff chuẩn; trích D-ID. README: một dòng trỏ runner + contract. LƯU Ý docs.maxLoc: contract ngắn gọn <150 dòng. SỬA THEO RELIABILITY PANEL (f): thêm e2e crash-idempotency: chạy --once với executor giả commit-rồi-treo/exit-nonzero bị kill sau move doing nhưng trước proposed; chạy --once lần hai → assert item được reap về trạng thái xác định (proposed nếu verify pass / blocked nếu không), nhánh có ĐÚNG MỘT commit worker (không double-commit), không worktree rò. SECURITY PANEL: contract doc thêm mục 'Ranh giới tin cậy' ngắn: chống đỡ bằng chỉ dẫn + nhánh-vứt-được (KHÔNG phải sandbox — worker chạy full quyền user); verify chạy như shell — bất biến: item do chính user tạo, không ingest từ nguồn lạ; .fgos-runner.json là config thực thi được. FEASIBILITY PANEL: verify của item trong e2e temp repo phải TỰ CHỨA (node -e / test -f) — temp repo không có suite, không npm test.

truths: e2e chạy binary runner thật trong repo git tạm, trọn vòng ra proposed + nhánh
Dep ở proposed không được dispatch ở lần --once thứ hai
Case verify-đỏ ra blocked, không proposed
E2e crash giữa item: --once lần hai reap về trạng thái xác định, đúng một commit worker, không rò worktree

artifacts.substantive: child process thật, executor giả, không mock fs
khung prompt + entry-router + câu handoff, trích D-ID

trace.outcome: e2e suite for the full runner loop is live: three cases against the real bin/fgos-runner.mjs + bin/fgos.mjs binaries in disposable temp git repos with self-contained fake executors — (1) full two-item journey: item1 -> proposed with exactly one worker commit on fgw/item1, runner-run goal-check evidence (VERIFY_OK marker) in stdout, events.jsonl chain add/add/doing/proposed all carrying v, item2 held closed while its dep sits at proposed, second --once idle with no new event; (2) verify-red: wrong-commit worker retried per the matrix then parked blocked, never proposed; (3) crash-idempotency: runner genuinely SIGKILLed mid-item by its own child, second --once reaps to a defined state with exactly one worker commit and zero leaked worktrees (this case first exposed the real startupReap orphaned-checkout bug, fixed by phase-2-routing-10, and now passes unchanged as its regression test). docs/routing-handoff-contract.md (78 lines): 4-part prompt frame, entry-router table, standard handoff sentences, Ranh gioi tin cay section, D-IDs cited. README: one pointer line for runner + contract. Verify: npm test 234/234.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": ["test/runner/loop.test.mjs", "test/e2e/rebuild-determinism.test.mjs"],
  "tests_added_or_changed": ["test/e2e/runner-loop.test.mjs (new, 3 e2e cases: full journey with dep gating, verify-red -> blocked, crash-idempotency via real SIGKILL of the runner process)"],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before state: no e2e file and no contract doc existed (git ls-files had no test/e2e/runner-loop.test.mjs, no docs/routing-handoff-contract.md). Genuine red run recorded on this cell's earlier blocked attempt (trace verify record 2026-07-14T07:37): npm test 229/230 — the crash-idempotency case failed deterministically with \"fatal: 'fgw/item-crash' is already checked out at ...\" because startupReap's throwaway worktree collided with the crashed run's leaked checkout; that red is what surfaced the product bug fixed by phase-2-routing-10 (commit 3f4f141), after which the same unmodified test passes.",
  "verification_run": "npm test -> tests 234, pass 234, fail 0 (baseline 227 + 3 new e2e + 4 from the phase-2-routing-10 fix)",
  "deliberate_exceptions": []
}

trace.blocked_reason: e2e crash-idempotency case (per cell action, reliability panel f) exposes a real, reproducible bug in src/runner/loop.mjs startupReap + src/runner/worktree.mjs createWorktree: when the runner process itself is SIGKILLed mid-item (after todo->doing, before proposed) the worker already committed on fgw/<id>, but the runner's own worktree teardown (in a finally) never ran, leaving that branch checked out at an orphaned path. A second --once's startup reap tries to open its own throwaway worktree on the SAME branch to goal-check the stale doing item, and git refuses ('fgw/<id> is already checked out at <path>') -- WorktreeError has no .category (only .errorClass), so it is uncaught by runOnce's classifier and bubbles to an exit-1 crash instead of reaping to proposed/blocked. This defeats startupReap's own documented purpose (idempotent crash recovery). Confirmed empirically and via the actual e2e test (test/e2e/runner-loop.test.mjs, case 3): 229/230 tests pass, only this one fails, deterministically, every run. Fix requires a design decision in src/runner/worktree.mjs and/or loop.mjs (detect + reclaim a branch already checked out at a now-orphaned path before allocating a fresh throwaway worktree, or give WorktreeError a .category so the failure at least maps to a clean classified halt instead of an uncaught crash) -- out of this cell's file scope (test/docs/README only), per the cell's own explicit instruction to return BLOCKED rather than fix src/ out of scope. The other two required e2e cases (full journey, verify-red) and the routing-handoff-contract.md + README pointer are complete and passing; only case 3 is red.
